indexGlobs.description: DEPRECATED: Use 'index' instead. Globs of what to index. By default, indexes all .sv and .svh files in the workspace.

index.description: Index configurations; by default indexes all .sv, .svh, .v, and .vh files in the workspace.

excludeDirs.description: DEPRECATED: Use 'index' instead. Directories to exclude.

indexingThreads.description: Thread count to use for indexing

buildPattern.description: Build file glob pattern, e.g. `builds/{}.f`. Used for selecting build files. If omitted and no other build source is configured, defaults to matching all `.f` files in the workspace.

buildRelativePaths.description: Whether build files use paths relative to that file

wavesPattern.description: Waveform file glob to open given a build. Name and top variables can be passed with {name}, {top}.

wcpCommand.description: Waveform viewer command ({} will be replaced with the WCP port), used for direct wcp connection with neovim and surfer.

inlayHints.description: Inline hints for things like ordered arguments, wildcard ports, and others

builds.description: Builds for direct .f selection or command-based .f generation

name.description: Optional name used for generated build files and UI labels

glob.description: Glob pattern to find files, like .f files or makefiles

command.description: Optional command that produces .f content on stdout when passed the selected file

docCommentFormat.description: How to render leading doc comments in hovers: 'markdown' renders as markdown, 'plaintext' escapes markdown characters, 'raw' shows the comment text verbatim including comment markers.

oneOf.description: Strip comment markers and escape markdown characters so the text renders as-is.
Strip comment markers and render the contents as markdown.
Show the comment text verbatim, including comment markers, in a code block.

excludeDirs.description: Directories to exclude; only supports single directory names and applies to all path levels

orderedInstanceNames.description: Hints for names of ordered ports and params

wildcardNames.description: Hints for port names in wildcard (.*) ports

funcArgNames.description: Function argument hints: 0=off, N=only calls with >=N args

macroArgNames.description: Macro argument hints: 0=off, N=only calls with >=N args
